synopsis: An autonomous, paper-trading bot that runs three independent strategies — multi-lane US equity, 24/7 spot crypto, and an options-wheel — under a single orchestrator, decision store, and risk envelope.
Every order passes a layered gate stack (data quality, compliance, intel, risk caps, VaR, daily/weekly P&L circuit-breakers) before reaching the broker.
A nightly research lab runs purged walk-forward backtests, gates promotions on PBO and Deflated Sharpe, and uses a Claude Opus 4.7 architect/reviewer pipeline to draft new strategy templates.
Operational tooling — diagnose, daily digest, midday snapshot, dashboard, alert drain — keeps the human in the loop without coupling decisions to the human's response time.

stats.label: Python modules
stats.value: 132 .py files in src/trading_bot/ (incl. backtest, dashboard, news_trader, options, roles, validation)

stats.label: CLI subcommands
stats.value: 33 Click subcommands registered under bot (status, scan, full-run, wheel-scan, lab, …)

stats.label: Trading workflows
stats.value: 3 live (W1 stocks, W2 crypto, W3 options-wheel) + 1 library-only (W4 news-driven LLM)

stats.label: Intel sources
stats.value: 10+ free / paid feeds (Alpaca News, Polygon, FRED, GDELT, SEC EDGAR, Finnhub, ApeWisdom, CoinGecko, alt.me, Truth Social)

stats.label: LLM model
stats.value: claude-opus-4-7 — pinned in anthropic_client.py and news_trader/news_controller.py

stats.label: Persistence
stats.value: SQLite (state.db) — append-only DecisionStore + Alembic-managed schema; closed_trades.db, backtest_bars.db, news_sentiment.db caches

stats.label: Scheduler
stats.value: APScheduler with ~25 cron / interval jobs across stocks, crypto, wheel, lab, monitoring, reporting

stats.label: Hosting
stats.value: macOS launchd plists in ops/launchd/ — daemon, lab, dashboard, supervisor

tree:
Trading/
├── README.md
├── pyproject.toml                      # entry: bot = trading_bot.cli:main
├── src/trading_bot/                    # 132 .py modules
│   ├── cli.py, orchestrator.py, daemon.py, supervisor.py
│   ├── strategy.py, strategy_lanes.py, screener.py, regime.py

│   │   intelligence_apewisdom.py, news_sentiment.py, vip_tweets.py
│   ├── massive_client.py (Polygon)     # universe + bars + news + sentiment + short interest
│   ├── alpaca_client.py                # equities + crypto + options brackets
│   ├── risk_manager.py, var_engine.py, compliance.py, data_quality.py
│   ├── decisions_store.py, state_db.py, pnl_state.py, cost_tracker.py
│   ├── walkforward.py, evolution.py, calibration.py, lab.py
│   ├── validation/      (pbo.py, dsr.py, … promotion gates)

│   ├── news_trader/     (event_extractor.py, news_controller.py)
│   ├── options/         (wheel_runner.py, wheel_lane.py, chain.py, wheel_state.py)
│   ├── roles/           (strategy_architect, code_reviewer, calibrator, sentiment_analyst, param_optimizer)
│   ├── dashboard/       (FastAPI app + templates)
│   ├── reports.py, email_*.py, session_summary.py, journal_alpha.py
│   ├── scheduler_jobs.py, cadence.py
│   └── …
├── strategy/                            # config, watchlists, restricted lists
├── docs/                                # this PDF + architecture.pdf + plans/specs
├── tools/build_doc_pdf/                 # this builder
├── tests/                               # pytest suite (100+ files)
├── migrations/versions/                 # Alembic
├── ops/launchd/                         # macOS daemons (daemon, lab, dashboard, supervisor)
├── runs/YYYY-MM-DD/                     # JSONL execution logs
└── data/                                # SQLite DBs + heartbeat.json
